ogTitle: Okeden vs Old Cooranga: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Okeden and Old Cooranga.
heading: Okeden vs Old Cooranga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Okeden, Queensland and Old Cooranga, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Old Cooranga has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Okeden (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Okeden or Old Cooranga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Okeden has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Old Cooranga scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Okeden scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Old Cooranga scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Okeden or Old Cooranga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Old Cooranga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
